title: justicia crenata
intro: Justicia crenata, also known as the Saw-leaved Justicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia crenata include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. It is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
